allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = [] for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if line: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\(''type'',''''\) if role == ''assistant'': # Get text content for block in obj.get\(''message'',{}\).get\(''content'',[]\): if block.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': lines.append\(f''ASSISTANT: {block[""text""][:500]}''\) elif block.get\(''type''\) == ''tool_use'': lines.append\(f''TOOL_USE: {block[""name""]} -> {json.dumps\(block.get\(""input"",{}\)\)[:300]}''\) elif role == ''human'': for block in obj.get\(''message'',{}\).get\(''content'',[]\): if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': lines.append\(f''HUMAN: {block[""text""][:300]}''\) elif isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\(''type''\) == ''tool_result'': lines.append\(f''TOOL_RESULT: \(id={block.get\(""tool_use_id"",""""\)[:20]}\) {str\(block.get\(""content"",""""\)\)[:200]}''\) except: pass for l in lines[-60:]: print\(l\) ")
